speaker: SPEAKER_02

text: And it's a Gradle plugin that you set up.

speaker: SPEAKER_02

text: pushes a command to a remote server that will do the heavy lifting for you and then copy back the files and the results back to your computer.
speaker: SPEAKER_02

text: And so it's doing that under the hood for you, which was, I thought, pretty smart.

text: Like Swing doesn't have anything, any display to send its commands to.
speaker: SPEAKER_02

text: But what they did is, or when you run projector, it actually runs this thing called projector server, which is something that kind of hooks into the IDE and receives this swings draw commands that the IDE sends.
speaker: SPEAKER_02

text: Okay.

text: So this is the projector client.
speaker: SPEAKER_02

text: that receives those transformed drawing commands from the projector server and interprets them as web drawing commands, basically.
speaker: SPEAKER_02

text: So basically it goes from like swing commands to draw things like text and all that.

speaker: SPEAKER_02
